title: The Four Elements of ICH Q10
alt: The four interlinked elements of the ICH Q10 pharmaceutical quality system

items.label: Process Monitoring
items.desc: Confirms processes stay in a state of control via defined parameters

items.label: CAPA System
items.desc: Investigates deviations and complaints, scaled to the level of risk

items.label: Change Management
items.desc: Evaluates and implements change using product and process knowledge

items.label: Management Review
items.desc: Senior management reviews performance so issues are escalated and resourced
